name: safepay-ai
description: SafePay AI — Smart UPI Payment Risk Verification Platform

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf public && cp -r frontend/dist public
